market_pulse: Mid-June Vegas nightlife momentum is building with major resident DJs (David Guetta, Alesso, Tiësto, Steve Aoki) activating across Wynn, Caesars, and Resorts World; dayclub season peak energy with LIV, OMNIA, and Tao driving weekend traffic.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Multiple A-tier DJ residencies live (Tiësto, Alesso, Steve Aoki, Lavernmusic)
EDC afterglow still active in market consciousness
Strong dayclub momentum (LIV Beach, OMNIA, Tao, Encore)
Bottle service/VIP table demand historically high in mid-June
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Capitalize on weekend readiness with premium content around talent appearances and exclusive access offers; segment weekend inventory into premium/standard tiers.

content_gaps.description: Behind-the-scenes DJ/talent preparation content gaining traction at competitors (team setup, sound checks, meet-and-greets)
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create BTS video series around LIV's resident talent; show preparation, soundcheck rituals, and pre-show rituals to humanize lineup.

content_gaps.description: Short-form carousel posts with trending TikTok audio (EDM/house remixes, bass-boosted classics) seeing 2x+ engagement vs. static posts
content_gaps.suggested_action: Allocate 3x weekly carousel posts to TT/IG Reels using trending tracks from resident lineups; tag artists directly for repost amplification.

content_gaps.description: Contest-style UGC campaigns (#OmniaMemories, #TaoTakeover) driving authentic guest content and extending reach
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #LIVMoments UGC campaign with weekly prize (drink package, VIP table) for best submitted video; repost winners to main feed.

content_gaps.description: Countdown stickers (24h, 6h before shows) with exclusive discount codes are driving last-minute bookings at tier-1 competitors
content_gaps.suggested_action: Use Stories countdown feature on Fridays/Saturdays with exclusive guest list codes (e.g., LIVLAST10) expiring at showtime.

influencer_activity.mention: Spring break content at LIV Beach featuring John Summit set; high engagement on pool/fashion crossover content
LIV Beach opening day (March 2026) featured as resident curator; strong following in progressive house scene

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Spring break content creator with proven LIV Beach audience; 100k+ followers, high engagement on pool/nightlife content
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_approach: Partner for summer series: weekly LIV Beach takeovers with exclusive pool access + talent meet-and-greet
